show.title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
show.description: A heartbroken software engineer returns home to propose to his girlfriend, only to discover she’s already engaged to a millionaire. Crushed by betrayal, his life takes a sudden turn when a mysterious, wealthy girl offers him a one-month contract marriage — to stop her ex-fiancé and expose the truth. Their fake marriage starts with revenge, but where will it end?

show.title: Laapata Rajkumar
show.description: But when enemies close in and his past resurfaces, he must reclaim his power before losing everything, including the one person who stood by him.

show.title: Badla
show.description: Publicly humiliated and thrown out as a useless employee, Prithvi hides a shocking truth—he is the real force behind the empire that rejected him. After years of silent sacrifice for love, betrayal turns him ruthless. As he reveals his true identity, he doesn’t fight back—he destroys everything. Now, the woman who insulted him must face the man who can erase her world.

show.title: Guns & Gulab
show.description:
This story is a high-voltage romantic thriller set against the backdrop of crime, power, and emotional conflict. It explores the journey of Naina, an innocent yet resilient girl, whose life takes a drastic turn when she crosses paths with Kabir Ahuja—a ruthless mafia don who falls obsessively in love with her.
The narrative blends intense romance with action, betrayal, and family drama. At its core, it questions morality, power dynamics, and the meaning of love—whether love can be forced or must be earned.
With strong emotional stakes, dramatic twists, and a dominating male protagonist versus a morally grounded female lead, the story promises a gripping mix of passion, revenge, and transformation.

show.title: CM ki Dulhan
show.description: CM ki Dulhan is a political family drama set against the backdrop of dynastic Indian politics. The series explores how women, often treated as pawns in the game of power, can become players who change the very rules of the game. At its heart, the story is a love story born out of compulsion, evolving into a political partnership of equals. Through betrayal, corruption, and power struggles, Anandi and Arjun’s journey reflects themes of loyalty. Watch Now.

show.title: My Beggar Billionaire Husband
show.description: My Beggar Billionaire Husband

show.title: The Silent Champion
show.description: Bharat is mocked as a useless ghar-jamai who has trained in martial arts for 10 years but can’t defeat anyone. When his powerful in-laws force him to win a brutal tournament or divorce his wife, his life falls apart. But a mysterious master discovers Bharat’s rare divine body, a hidden power that could turn the world’s biggest underdog into its most unstoppable warrior.

show.title: Born Again
show.description: Born Again

show.title: The Little Pool Master
show.description: When world-renowned pool champion Akhil Gulati dies in a tragic accident, his soul mysteriously enters the body of a shy schoolboy, Arjun Sehgal. With goons threatening the Sehgal family's legacy, Arjun stuns everyone by becoming a pool prodigy overnight—guided by Akhil’s unmatched skill. As Akhil helps win the decisive match, he suddenly wakes up in his original body, realizing it was all a coma-induced miracle. A silent smile shared between Akhil and Arjun hints at an unbreakable, mystical bond.

show.title: Dhurandhar: Child King Returns
show.description: Hazaar saal purana yuvraj… ek modern 6 saal ke bachche ke sharir mein jaagta hai. Keshav Rajhans ko nahi pata yeh kismat ka khel hai ya kisi ki sazish. Par Rajhans parivaar ki andheri siyasat mein, uska tezz dimag sabko hila deta hai. Ab dekhna yeh hai - kya ek bachcha puri kismat palat sakta hai?

show.title: Instant Shehzada
show.description: After being cruelly dumped by his girlfriend for his "middle-class" status, Ayaan discovers he is the secret heir to the multi-billion dollar Arora Group of Industries. Now a powerful CEO, he systematically dismantles the corrupt rivals who once humiliated him while using his wealth to protect those he truly cares about. Along the way, he navigates dangerous traps set by gold diggers and vengeful socialites determined to steal his fortune.

show.title: Miracle Of God
show.description: Rudra lives with the wealthy Sahgal family, but despite his loyalty and love for them, he is always treated like an outsider. One night, he is falsely accused of stealing a priceless 50-crore necklace. His father Vineet Sahgal and sister believe the accusation without question and throw him out of the house. Behind the scenes, his manipulative stepbrother Vikrant “Vicky” Sahgal is actually responsible for the theft and secretly enjoys watching Rudra’s humiliation.

show.title: Beghar Billionaire
show.description: Armaan Raheja, a billionaire disguised as a beggar, and Kashish, a kind-hearted girl with simple dreams, find themselves bound by fate, lies, and love. What starts as a contract marriage to fulfill a grandmother’s last wish soon turns into an emotional journey where truth, betrayal, and destiny test their hearts. Watch Now!

show.title: Raw Agent YA Delivery Boy?
show.description: When delivery rider Kabir Deshmukh meets billionaire CEO Anika Singhania in a blind-date mix-up, her daughter Ishita fast-tracks him into a sham marriage to give her mother a partner she can trust. Kabir’s integrity wins hearts, but his mysterious past and enemies in Anika’s world ignite a war that forces him to reveal he’s actually ex-RAW agent Rudra Verma.

show.title: Mrs. Golddigger
show.description: After a rushed marriage to a stranger who demands ₹1 crore, a powerful CEO is convinced he’s been trapped by a gold digger—until his growing feelings and a haunting past force him to question if the woman he distrusts is actually the one who once saved his life.

show.title: Revenge Of Loyal Husband
show.description: Countries biggest businessman is cheated by his Wife, as he comes back to take revenge.

show.title: Arranged to Love
show.description: A billionaire businessman, Vikram Singhania, has to enter into an arranged marriage with Dr. Bhoomi Arora because of family pressure. What starts as a cold, forced marriage slowly transforms into an unexpected journey of trust, passion, and love. Arranged to Love is a romantic drama where duty collides with desire, and two strangers must decide if their hearts can truly meet.

show.title: Secret Shehzada
show.description: Jab ek gareeb naukar aur ek ameer ladki ke dil takraate hain, mohabbat ek jang ban jaati hai.

show.title: Jhukega Nahi Saala
show.description:
A powerful man living as a taxi driver fights crime while hiding his true identity and past pain.
When a woman from his past returns with his daughter, he must protect them and face his enemies and family secrets.

show.title: Right Match
show.description: A heartbroken girl gives herself 60 days to find love on her own terms. As she navigates modern dating, heartbreaks, and self-doubt, an unexpected connection tests her faith—until fate reveals that true love was real all along.

show.title: Dead Man Returns
show.description: A woman who believes her husband died in a tragic accident is forced to rebuild her life—only for him to return years later as a powerful, vengeful man who thinks she betrayed him, igniting a battle of love, lies, and a hidden truth that could change everything.

items.title: Holi Specials

show.title: Crorepati Chaprasi
show.description: An abandoned son returns years later with wealth, power, and a burning desire to reclaim his rightful place. But as secrets unravel and loyalties are tested, his journey of revenge collides with the search for love and belonging.

show.title: Badla
show.description: Publicly humiliated and thrown out as a useless employee, Prithvi hides a shocking truth—he is the real force behind the empire that rejected him. After years of silent sacrifice for love, betrayal turns him ruthless. As he reveals his true identity, he doesn’t fight back—he destroys everything. Now, the woman who insulted him must face the man who can erase her world.

show.title: Laapata Rajkumar

show.title: Royal Gaonwali
show.description: Gaon se aayi Aksha apni maa ke saath sheher aati hai behen Isha ke paas, lekin Isha status ke liye unhe apna kehne se inkaar kar deti hai. Aksha ki asli pehchaan chhupakar wo khud ek rich heiress ban jaati hai. Ek purana pendant Aksha ko uski khoi hui maa, Mrs. Patel tak le jaata hai. Jab maa par hamla hota hai, raaz khulte hain — DNA test se sach saamne aata hai: Aksha hi asli Shana Patel hai. Media ke saamne Isha ka jhooth ujagar hota hai, aur Aksha apna sach, maa aur sammaan wapas pa leti hai.

show.title: Lady Boss Returns
show.description:
My Boss Lady is a modern romantic drama set against the glittering world of luxury hotels, real estate empires, and high-stakes corporate alliances.
 It explores love, betrayal, and revenge through the journey of Kiara Bhansali, a self-made billionaire who hides her identity to test loyalty and integrity — and ends up meeting Tej Jaisingh, an ambitious CEO caught between love and legacy.
Their accidental meeting spirals into a whirlwind of mistaken identities, class clashes, fake marriages, and boardroom battles — until Kiara’s true power as the “Sky Queen” turns the game upside down.
 The series balances romantic comedy, emotional redemption, and corporate intrigue, delivering a story about a woman reclaiming love and respect on her own terms.

show.title: Prince Paanwala
show.description:
This drama blends romance, revenge, hidden identity, and high-society power politics. At its heart is Ramya  Rajgeer, the secret heiress of a business empire and the anonymous genius designer “Miss Pearl.” After being humiliated by her opportunistic boyfriend, she impulsively marries Aasman Oberoi—unaware that he too is hiding his real identity as the billionaire head of the Oberoi Group.
Their contract marriage slowly transforms into real love, while enemies from both sides attempt to destroy them. The show explores ego clashes, family honor, ambition, betrayal, and redemption in the glamorous yet ruthless world of business dynasties.

show.title: Super Dad Sunil Tyagi
show.description: A scrap dealer secretly living as a billionaire tests his daughter’s strength and love. When her rich fiancé betrays and humiliates them, the truth is revealed—bringing justice, redemption, and proving that real wealth is character, not money.

show.title: Ek Anjani Shaadi
show.description: A woman starts falling for her charming boss while adjusting to a new job, but a hidden truth complicates everything — she’s already married to a man she barely knows. Their rare encounters have left their relationship a forgotten shadow of a commitment.

show.title: Swag se Swaagat
show.description: A powerful businessman, Thakur Saahb, secretly lives as a prisoner to complete a mission while hiding his identity—even from his own son. When his son Aman is brutally attacked by powerful enemies, Thakur returns to save him, revealing his true strength. Amid betrayal, revenge, and love, he destroys his rivals, restores justice, and protects his family while keeping his legacy intact.

show.title: Raja Sahab Returns
show.description: Surya, a former jailer and the secret kingpin of the coal mining empire, hides his true identity to give his son Adarsh a normal life. But when Adarsh is brutally humiliated, tortured, & kidnapped by the arrogant son of Surya’s own former ally, Surya is forced to step back into the world he left behind. As enemies try to destroy him and take over his empire, Surya returns as Raja Sahab,  not just to reclaim his throne, but to protect his son, destroy his enemies, & clean his empire from within.

show.title: Mai Jhoota Tu Jhooti
show.description: Two childhood lovers reunite and rush into marriage, believing they’ve found love beyond money. But there’s a twist—both are secretly billionaires, pretending to be poor. As lies pile up, their relationship is tested by ego, humiliation, and hidden truths. When reality finally hits, will their love survive the biggest secret of all… or shatter forever?
